UnitAbilities.Title: No Escape

When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lithe Embarkation
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Ynnari Infantry unit that only includes models from the units listed in this unit’s Transport section, that has 6 or fewer models and that is wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport. That unit can embark within this Transport in a turn it disembarked from this Transport.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: Before the battle, at the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Ynnari Kabalite Warriors or Ynnari WYCHESunit from your army that has not already been split. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this Transport; the other can start the battle embarked within another Transport, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm of Blades
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Empowered by Death

UnitAbilities.Title: Cluster Caltrops

UnitAbilities.Title: Grav-talon

UnitAbilities.Title: Eviscerating Fly-by

UnitAbilities.Title: Aethersails

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT

UnitAbilities.Title: Phantasm Grenade Launcher

UnitAbilities.Title: Sadistic Raiders
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if you control an objective marker that this unit (or a Transport it is embarked within) is within range of, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tormentors
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Overlord
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is below its Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re‐roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reborn Mastermind
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shadow Field
UnitAbilities.Text: You cannot re‐roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Piratical Hero

UnitAbilities.Title: Prince of Corsairs

When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aethersense (Psychic)

UnitAbilities.Title: Fury of the Void (Psychic)

Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an Aeldari model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hallucinogen Grenades

Rule.Title: MARTIAL GRACE
Rule.Text:
▪ At the start of the battle round, you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

	▪ Each time a unit from your army performs the Swift as the Wind Agile Manoeuvre, until the end of the phase, add an additional 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

	▪ Each time a unit from your army performs an Agile Manoeuvre that involves rolling a D6, add 1 to the result.

Stratagems.Name: Lightning-fast Reactions
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Skyborne Sanctuary
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One unengaged Asuryani unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly Transport it is able to embark within.
Stratagems.Effect: If your Asuryani unit is wholly within 6" of that Transport, it can embark within it.

Stratagems.Name: Feigned Retreat
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Asuryani unit from your army makes a Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Aeldari unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge this turn even though it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Blitzing Firepower
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aeldari unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 12", if such a weapon already has that ability, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Fire and Fade
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, just after an Asuryani Infantry unit from your army (excluding Aircraft, Asurmen and Wraith Construct units) has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".
Stratagems.Restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge or embark within a Transport.

Stratagems.Name: Webway Tunnel
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Infantry unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Phoenix Gem
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one of more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

Enhancements.Name: Timeless Strategist
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any Transport it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

Enhancements.Name: Gift of Foresight
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

Enhancements.Name: Psychic Destroyer
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

Rule.Title: RIDE THE WIND
Rule.Text:
In the Declare Battle Formations step you can set up Asuryani Mounted and Vypers units from your army in Reserves. During the battle, such units can be set up on the battlefield as if they were arriving from Strategic Reserves. For the purposes of setting up Asuryani Mounted or Vypers units from your army on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

In addition, at the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of Asuryani Mounted or Vypers units from your army (excluding units within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units), then remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as shown below.

	▪ Incursion - 1 unit
	▪ Strike Force - 2 units
	▪ Onslaught - 3 units

KEYWORDS
Windriders units from your army gain the Battleline keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Death From On High
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Mounted or Vypers unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield from Reserves this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Unit the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Overflight
Stratagems.When: End of your Shooting phase or the end of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Mounted unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 7".

Stratagems.Name: Wind of Blades
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Mounted oF Vypers unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Daring Riders
Stratagems.When: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Mounted or Vypers unit from your army in Reserves.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting up your unit on the battlefield from Reserves, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if your unit is set up within 8" horizontally of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Focused Firepower
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Mounted or Vypers unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Spiralling Evasion
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Mounted or Vypers unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Enhancements.Name: Firstdrawn Blade
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Mounted model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Mirage Field
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Mounted model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Seersight Strike
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Mounted Psyker model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the nearer have the [ANTI-MONSTER 2+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 2+] abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Mounted model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent's deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

Rule.Title: STRANDS OF FATE
Rule.Text:
At the start of the first battle round, you generate Fate dice by rolling a number of D6 based on the battle size, as shown below. Keep your Fate dice to one side - this is your Fate dice pool.

	▪ Incursion - 3
	▪ Strike Force - 6
	▪ Onslaught - 9

Each time you use one of the detachment Stratagems, if your Fate dice pool contains one or more Fate dice showing the corresponding value in the table below, you can discard one of those corresponding Fate dice. If you do, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

	▪ Presentiment of Dread - 1
	▪ Forewarned - 2
	▪ Unshrouded Truth - 3
	▪ Fate Inescapable - 4
	▪ Isha's Fury - 5
	▪ Psychic Shield - 6

Stratagems.Name: Presentiment of Dread
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Psyker unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

Stratagems.Name: Forewarned
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unt has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Infantry Unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and is within 9" of one of more friendly Asuryani Psyker models.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Unshrouded Truth
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Infantry unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that has not been selected to move this phase, was  not set up on the battlefield this phase, and is within 8" of one or more  friendly Asuryani Psyker models.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.
Stratagems.Restrictions: Until the end of the phase, your unit is not eligible to be selected to move.

Stratagems.Name: Fate Inescapable
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Infantry Unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that has not been selected to shoot that phase and is within 9" of one or more friendly Asuryani Psyker models.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Isha's Fury
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Psyker model from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Psychic Shield
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Infantry Unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and is within 9" of one of more friendly Asuryani Psyker models.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Enhancements.Name: Lucid Eye
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Psyker model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

Enhancements.Name: Runes of Warding
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Stone of Eldritch Fury
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Torc of Morai-Heg
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Rule.Title: SHEPHERDS OF THE DEAD
Rule.Text:
Each time an Asuryani Psyker model from your army is destroyed by an enemy unit, that unit gains a Vengeful Dead token. Each time a Wraith Construct model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit with one or more Vengeful Dead tokens, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Asuryani Psyker models from your army have the following ability:
Spirit Guides (Aura): While a Wraithblades, Wraithguard or Wraithlord unit from your army is within 12" of this model, that unit has the Battle Focus ability.

KEYWORDS
Wraithblades and Wraithguard units from your army gains the Battleline keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Seer's Eye
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Asuryani Psyker Model trom Your army and one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your Psyker model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your Wraith Construct unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Armour Penetration and or Damage characteristics of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Wraithbone Armour
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Wraith Construct unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Blades From Beyond
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Wraithblades, Wraithlord or Wraithknight unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end ofthe phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Soul Bridge
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Wraithblades, Wraithlord or Wraithknight unit from your army and one Asuryani Psyker model from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your Wraithblades, Wraithlord or Wraithknight unit is considered to be within 12" of your Psyker model for the purposes of the Psychic Guidance and Spirit Guides abilities.

Stratagems.Name: Spirit Token
Stratagems.When: Start of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Wraithblades or Wraithguard unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Crushing Strides
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, just after a Wraithblades, Wraithlord or Wraithknight unit from your army ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Wraithblades, Wraithlord or Wraithknight unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each Wraithblades model in your unit, opr roll four D6 if your unit has the Wraithlord keyword, or roll six D6 if your unit has the Wraithknight keyword: for each 3+, that enemy unit sufferes 1 mortal wound.

Enhancements.Name: Higher Duty
Enhancements.Description: Spiritseer model only. In your opponent's Movement phase, if an  enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within  Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a  Normal move of up to 6".

Enhancements.Name: Light of Clarity
Enhancements.Description: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Infanty models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of Monster models in that unit.

Enhancements.Name: Rune of Mists
Enhancements.Description: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18", models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Stave of Kurnous
Enhancements.Description: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding Titanic units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Would, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

AddedAbilities.Title: Spirit Guides (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While a Wraithblades, Wraithguard or Wraithlord unit from your army is within 12" of this model, that unit has the Battle Focus ability.

Rule.Title: ACROBATIC ONSLAUGHT
Rule.Text:
Each time a Harlequins model from your army makes a Charge move, it can move through enemy models.

TRAVELLING PLAYERS
	▪ Troupe units from you army gain the Battleline keyword and Troupe models in those units have an Objective Control characteristic of 2.
	▪ You can include up to three of each of the following models in your army: Death Jester.Shadowseer, Troupe Master.

Stratagems.Name: Staged Death
Stratagems.Category: GHOSTS OF THE WEBWAY - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins Character model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
Stratagems.Restrictions: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: Heroes' Fall
Stratagems.Category: GHOSTS OF THE WEBWAY - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unt has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Mocking Flight
Stratagems.Category: GHOSTS OF THE WEBWAY - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Harlequins Unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Harlequins unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Tricksters' Retort
Stratagems.Category: GHOSTS OF THE WEBWAY - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Troupe unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Bloody Dance
Stratagems.Category: GHOSTS OF THE WEBWAY - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins Infantry or Harlequins Mounted unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.
Stratagems.Restrictions: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

Stratagems.Name: Exit The Stage
Stratagems.Category: GHOSTS OF THE WEBWAY - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Cegorach's Coil
Enhancements.Description: Troupe Master model only. Each time the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer's unit that is within Engagment Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

Enhancements.Name: Mask of Secrets
Enhancements.Description: Harlequins model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

Enhancements.Name: Murder's Jest
Enhancements.Description: Death Jester model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below Half-strength, each successful Hit scores a Critical Hit.

Enhancements.Name: Mistweave
Enhancements.Description: Shadowseer model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

Rule.Title: DEFEND AT ALL COSTS
Rule.Text: Each time a Dire Avenger, Guardian, Support Weapon or War Walker model from your army makes an attack, if that model's unit and/or the target unit are within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Warding Salvoes
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Dire Avengers or Guardians unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Shield Nodes
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Dire Avengers or Guardians Unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is within range of one or more objective markers, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Vaul's Vengeance
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a Dire Avengers or Guardians unit from your army.
Stratagems.Target: One War Walkers unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: After that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks, can only target that enemy unit (and only if is an eligible target).
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

Stratagems.Name: Time to Strike
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Storm Guardians unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Blades of Asyryan
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Dire Avengers or Guardians unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PISTOL] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Cost of Victory
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Guardians unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. When doing so, return every destroyed Guardians model to your unit.

Enhancements.Name: Breath of Vaul
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. While the bearer is leading a Storm Guardians  unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with  a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re‑roll the result, and  each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a fusion  gun in that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

Enhancements.Name: Craftworld's Champion
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

Enhancements.Name: Ethereal Pathway
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two Guardians units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

Enhancements.Name: Protector of the Paths
Enhancements.Description: Asuryani model only. While the bearer is leading a Dire Avengers or Guardians unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

Rule.Title: PATH OF THE WARRIOR
Rule.Text:
Each time an Aspect Warriors or Avatar of Khaine unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, select one of the following abilities for it to gain until the end of the phase:

	▪ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
	▪ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Warrior Focus
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aspect Warriors or Avatar of Khaine unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill, Weapon skill, Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: To Their Final Breath
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Aspect Warriors or Avatar of Khaine unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of that attacking units attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Skyborne Sanctuary
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One unengaged Asuryani unit from your army that was  eligible to fight this phase and one friendly Transport it is able to  embark within.
Stratagems.Effect: If your Asuryani unit is wholly within 6" of that Transport, it can embark within it.

Stratagems.Name: Doom Inescapable
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Avatar of Khaine model from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your model's Wailing Doom ranged weapon has a Range characteristic of 18" and Damage characterisic of 8.

Stratagems.Name: Preternatural Precision
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aspect Warriors unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, select one of the following abilities, or select two of the following abilities if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem: [IGNORES COVER], [LETHAL HITS], [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected abilities.

Stratagems.Name: Khaine's Vengeance
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is selected to Fall Back.
Stratagems.Target: One Aspect Warriors or Avatar of Khaine unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: All models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

Enhancements.Name: Aspect of Murder
Enhancements.Description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Mantle of Wisdom
Enhancements.Description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

Enhancements.Name: Shimmerstone
Enhancements.Description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Strategic Savant
Enhancements.Description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

Rule.Title: STRENGTH FROM DEATH
Rule.Text:
You can use the following rules:

Lethal Intent
At the end of your opponent’s Shooting phase, if one or more Ynnari units from your army were destroyed this phase, select one Ynnari Infantry or Ynnari Mounted unit within 6" of your destroyed unit. It can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

Lethal Surge
Once per turn, when a Ynnari unit performs the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre, it can make a surge move of up to D6+1" instead of a Normal move.

Lethal Reprisal
At the start of the Fight phase, select one Ynnari unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that is below its Starting Strength. Until the end of the phase, that unit has the Fights First ability.

SERVANTS OF THE WHISPERING GOD
	■ You can include Ynnari units in your army, even though they do not have the Asuryani Faction keyword.
	■ Asuryani units (excluding Epic Heroes) from your army gain the Ynnari keyword.
	■ You must include Yvraine and/or The Yncarne in your army, and one of those models must be your Warlord.

Stratagems.Name: Soulsight
Stratagems.Category: DEVOTED OF YNNEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Ynnari unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

Stratagems.Name: Death Answers Death
Stratagems.Category: DEVOTED OF YNNEAD - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Ynnari unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units), if one or more models in that unit were destroyed this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase.

Stratagems.Name: Macabre Resilience
Stratagems.Category: DEVOTED OF YNNEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Ynnari Infantry or Ynnari Mounted unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Parting the Veil
Stratagems.Category: DEVOTED OF YNNEAD - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Ynnari unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Emissaries of Ynnead
Stratagems.Category: DEVOTED OF YNNEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after a Ynnari Infantry unit from your army has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: That Ynnari Infantry unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Pall of Dread
Stratagems.Category: DEVOTED OF YNNEAD - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Ynnari unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Enhancements.Name: Gaze of Ynnead
Enhancements.Description: Farseer model only. The bearer’s Eldritch Storm weapon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Morbid Might
Enhancements.Description: Succubus model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Borrowed Vigour
Enhancements.Description: Archon model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

Enhancements.Name: Storm of Whispers
Enhancements.Description: Warlock model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

Rule.Title: BOONS OF THE BROOD
Rule.Text:
Weapons equipped by Harlequins Mounted and Harlequins Vehicle models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
Each time a Harlequins unit from your army disembarks from a Transport, until the end of the turn, that unit’s weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

TRAVELLING PLAYERS
▪ Troupe units from your army gain the Battleline keyword, and Troupe models in those units have an Objective Control characteristic of 2.
▪ You can include up to three of each of the following models in your army: Death Jester, Shadowseer, Troupe Master.

Stratagems.Name: Fangs of the Brood
Stratagems.When: Start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Troupe unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, when using your unit’s Dance of Death ability, you can select three of the abilities for your unit to gain, instead of one.

Stratagems.Name: Venomous Wrath
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: After your unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Striking Stride
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Weavers’ Coils
Stratagems.When: End of your Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins Mounted unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Weaving Stride
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins Infantry unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Skyward Lunge
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harlequins Vehicle or Harlequins Mounted unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Key Of Ghosts
Enhancements.Description: Harlequins model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Weavers' Wail
Enhancements.Description: Troupe Master model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

Enhancements.Name: Fanged Leer
Enhancements.Description: Death Jester model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

Enhancements.Name: Shedskin Raiment
Enhancements.Description: Shadowseer model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Harlequins units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Rule.Title: YRIEL’S OWN
Rule.Text:
Aeldari units in your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced. In addition, each time an Anhrathe, Rangers or Shroud Runners unit from your army Advances, you can re-roll the Advance roll.

VETERANS OF THE VOID
Each time you add an Anhrathe unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement. Each Corsair Enhancement included in your army must be unique. If a unit is given a Corsair Enhancement, you must increase the points cost of that unit by the amount shown. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

Stratagems.Name: Raiders’ Spoils
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Anhrathe unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Ruthless Killers
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Corsair Voidscarred unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or Fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Yriel’s Example
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Aeldari Infantry unit from your army (excluding Wraith Construct units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: No Prey Too Big
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Anhrathe, Rangers or Shroud Runners unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than the highest Toughness characteristic of models in the target unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Impeding Fire
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Rangers, Shroud Runners or Starfang unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding Titanic units) visible to and within 36" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

Stratagems.Name: Withdraw and Reinforce
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Anhrathe unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If that unit is below Starting Strength, return all destroyed models (excluding Character models) to that unit.

Enhancements.Name: Pirate Prince
Enhancements.Description: Prince Yriel unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

Enhancements.Name: Alacritous Assault
Enhancements.Description: Anhrathe unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Exotic Munitions
Enhancements.Description: Anhrathe unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Adrenal Infusions
Enhancements.Description: Anhrathe Infantry unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

Rule.Title: RELENTLESS RAIDERS
Rule.Text:
While an objective marker is under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Anhrathe units from your army have the following ability:
Void Thieves: At the end of a phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

VETERANS OF THE VOID
Each time you add an Anhrathe unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement. Each Corsair Enhancement included in your army must be unique. If a unit is given a Corsair Enhancement, you must increase the points cost of that unit by the amount shown. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

Stratagems.Name: Pirates’ Due
Stratagems.When: The Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Aeldari unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit has the Anhrathe keyword, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Lethal Ruse
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Aeldari unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Aeldari unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is an Anhrathe unit, also select one enemy unit your unit was within Engagement Range of at the start of the phase, and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Outcast Ambush
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Rangers or Shroud Runners unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] and [RAPID FIRE 1] abilities, and until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Into the Breach
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, just after an Anhrathe unit from your army destroyed one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Target: That Anhrathe unit.
Stratagems.Effect: After your unit has resolved all of its shooting attacks, it can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

Stratagems.Name: Cloak and Shadow
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Aeldari Infantry unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker that you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability and your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Stratagems.Name: Vengeful Sorrow
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Aeldari Infantry unit from your army, if one or more models in that unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, and if that Aeldari unit is neither Battle-shocked nor within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 1 to the roll: models in your unit move a number of inches up to this result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Infamy (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Anhrathe unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

Enhancements.Name: Webway Pathstone
Enhancements.Description: Anhrathe unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Archraider
Enhancements.Description:
Anhrathe Character unit only. At the start of the battle, select one Character model in this unit. That model has the following ability:
Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Voidstone
Enhancements.Description: Anhrathe Infantry unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

AddedAbilities.Title: Void Thieves
AddedAbilities.Text: At the end of a phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

ArmyRules.Title: BATTLE FOCUS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Asuryani, at the start of the battle round, your receive a number of Battle Focus tokens based on the battle size, as shown in the table below.

	▪ Incursion - 2 Battle Focus Tokens
	▪ Strike Force - 4 Battle Focus Tokens
	▪ Onslaught - 6 Battle Focus Tokens

Each time one of the triggers shown in the Agile Manoeuvres section below occurs, you can spend one Battle Focus token to enable the relevant eligible unit to perform that Agile Manoeuvre. A unit is eligible to perform an Agile Manoeuvre if it has this ability and has not already performed an Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot trigger the same Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all unspent Battle Focus tokens are lost.

AGILE MANOEUVRES

Swift as the wind
	▪ Trigger: When an eligible unit from your army is selected to make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move. You can trigger this Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase (provided a different unit performs it each time).
	▪ Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

Flitting shadows
	▪ Trigger: When an eligible unit from your army is selected to make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, is set up on the battlefield, or declares a charge.
	▪ Effect: Until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at that unit.

Star Engines
	▪ Trigger: When an eligible Vehicle unit from your army is selected to make an Advance move.
	▪ Effect: Until the end of the turn, Ranged weapons equipped by this unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Sudden Strike
	▪ Trigger: When an eligible unit from your army is selected to fight.
	▪ Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

Opportunity Seized
	▪ Trigger: When an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
	▪ Effect: One eligible unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

Fade Back
	▪ Trigger: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
	▪ Effect: One eligible unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that was hit by one or more of those attacks can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

ArmyRules.Title: DISPARATE PATHS
ArmyRules.Text: When mustering your army, you can include Harlequins units in your army, even though they do not have the Asuryani Faction keyword. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot select Harlequins or Ynnari as your Army Faction.
